title: Selected
body: ## A greener solution for Minecraft button selection ### Selected is a resource pack that enhances the way you see what is selected, adding more color and fixing Minecraft selection inconsistencies Forget the times of the little white line around the button that if you got distracted you might not even realize what was selected! ![](https://i.imgur.com/uTKDgXv.png) ### Select all you want The selection of all buttons is changed, not only the menu ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o0wReQ9S/images/d6aa11aeb7f9f437cc19b724e40bedf112832b88.png) ---
